-content">    <span class="webkit-html-tag">&lt;td <span class="webkit-html-attribute-name">id</span>="<span class="webkit-html-attribute-value">dt1_XOM_last</span>" <span class="webkit-html-attribute-name">align</span>="<span class="webkit-html-attribute-value">right</span>" <span class="webkit-html-attribute-name">class</span>="<span class="webkit-html-attribute-value">ds_last qb_shad</span>" <span class="webkit-html-attribute-name">nowrap</span>="<span class="webkit-html-attribute-value">nowrap</span>"&gt;</span>93.92<span class="webkit-html-tag">&lt;/td&gt;</span></td></tr><tr><td class="webkit-line-number" value="2229"></td><td class="webkit-line-content">    <span class="webkit-html-tag">&lt;td <span class="webkit-html-attribute-name">id</span>="<span class="webkit-html-attribute-value">dt1_XOM_change</span>" <span class="webkit-html-attribute-name">align</span>="<span class="webkit-html-attribute-value">right</span>" <span class="webkit-html-attribute-name">class</span>="<span class="webkit-html-attribute-value">ds_change qb_shad</span>" <span class="webkit-html-attribute-name">nowrap</span>="<span class="webkit-html-attribute-value">nowrap</span>"&gt;</span><span class="webkit-html-tag">&lt;span <span class="webkit-html-attribute-name">class</span>="<span class="webkit-html-attribute-value">qb_up</span>"&gt;</span>+0.62<span class="webkit-html-tag">&lt;/span&gt;</span><span class="webkit-html-tag">&lt;/td&gt;</span></td></tr><tr><td class="webkit-line-number" value="2230"></td><td class="webkit-line-content">    <span class="webkit-html-tag">&lt;td <span class="webkit-html-attribute-name">id</span>="<span class="webkit-html-attribute-value">dt1_XOM_pctchange</span>" <span
